title: Why Do UFOs Show Up on Nuclear Bases?
summary: This interview discusses UFO activity at nuclear bases across the United States, featuring testimony about incidents at nuclear missile sites, weapons storage areas, and test sites. The discussion centers on claims that UFOs have been observed at every US nuclear base and have allegedly caused missile system malfunctions.

key_claims.claim: Every single nuclear base in the US has been visited by UFOs
Robert Hastings has located and interviewed more than 120 former or retired military personnel who report UFO incidents at nuclear sites
Nuclear missiles suddenly shut down when large pulsating oval objects were reported floating near missile facilities
Robert Salas compared UFO interference with nuclear weapons to taking matches out of the hands of a baby
